name: Visual Identity, Football Assets & Speed

assets.actual_crests: uses homeLogo/awayLogo from live fixture data
assets.country_flags: uses fixture league flag with country fallback
assets.missing_asset_behavior: branded crest shield or country/globe fallback
assets.performance: lazy loading, async decoding, API-Sports image runtime cache

browser_execution: Playwright tests are included for GitHub Actions; not executed in this sandbox.
